creator: mk@nic-nac-project.org
text:
Created attachment 190516
svn diff to upgrade dsbbatmon to version 1.0.1

Changes

- A bug where DSBBatmon falsely warns about the battery status a few moments
  after program start has been fixed.

Release notes: https://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbbatmon-relnotes.html

QA:
portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 11Ramd64)
